title: The Tubewell House 📖 | Psychological Thriller | Village Secrets | Abhishek Chaudhary
description:
The Tubewell House 📖
A gripping psychological thriller set in a quiet village where hidden secrets and haunting pasts slowly unravel.
Follows Ashank Sinha, a former forex trader, as he arrives in Lawrenceganj and is drawn into mysterious connections and unanswered questions.
As buried truths resurface, he is forced to face his past and a reality that blurs instinct, memory, and fear.
A tense, emotional story filled with suspense, mystery, and psychological depth.

title: Never Lie: A Totally Gripping Thriller with Mind-bending Twists | TikTok Viral & Bestseller Pick
description:
Psychological Thriller 📖
Newlyweds Tricia and Ethan move into a remote manor that once belonged to a missing psychiatrist, Dr. Adrienne Hale.
Trapped inside during a violent storm, Tricia discovers hidden audio transcripts from the doctor’s patient sessions.
As she listens, she uncovers disturbing secrets about the house and the mysterious disappearance.
A gripping, twist-filled thriller where every clue brings her closer to the truth… and danger.

title: You Can 📘 | Self-Help & Motivation | George Matthew Adams | Success & Personal Growth
description:
You Can 📘
A classic self-help guide focused on building self-belief, discipline, and personal growth for a successful life.
Encourages habits like self-reflection, learning from mistakes, managing time, and helping others to achieve your goals.
Filled with timeless motivational wisdom ✨ that inspires you to take control of your thoughts, actions, and future.
A powerful reminder that success begins with believing in yourself 💪

title: You Are Born to Blossom 📘 | Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam | Motivation & Personal Growth for Youth
description:
You Are Born to Blossom 📘
An inspiring vision by Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam on education, knowledge, and national development.
Highlights how rural talent, technology, and education can work together to transform society and build a better future.
Encourages a growth mindset 🌱 where learning continues at every stage of life, from students to senior citizens.
A motivational guide for youth ✨ promoting discipline, creativity, and values in building a strong nation.

title: The Academy | A Middle Grade Football Adventure for Kids 8-12 | Books for Football Fans
description:
The Academy 📘
A fast-paced, inspiring soccer story about Leo K. Doyle, a small-town boy with big dreams of becoming a professional player.
When he gets a chance to join the elite London Dragons youth squad, he steps into a world of intense competition, challenges, and self-discovery.
Facing rivals, pressure, and his own fears, Leo must prove himself among the best young players in the world.
A motivational sports adventure ⚽ about dreams, teamwork, resilience, and never giving up.

title: Ruskin Bond Short Stories - Set of 4 Bestselling Children Story Books
description:

description:

description:

Packed with scientific insights and stunning cosmic facts ✨ that make space exploration easy and exciting to understand.

title: The Little Book of Cosmic Energy: A Beginner’s Guide to Harnessing the Power of the Universe
description:

Explains how raising your frequency ✨ can help improve happiness, health, and overall well-being.
Includes simple practices like meditation, chakra balancing, reiki, crystal healing, and aura cleansing 💫.

title: Self-Compassion
description:

A powerful guide that helps you stop self-criticism and overcome insecurity to live a more peaceful and fulfilled life.
Focuses on building self-compassion 💖 instead of self-esteem, as a healthier way to handle stress and emotional struggles.
Includes practical exercises and action plans 🌿 to deal with everyday challenges like relationships, parenting, and personal growth.
A supportive psychology-based book ✨ that helps you accept yourself, heal emotionally, and unlock your true potential.
